scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server-assets
scripts.build:server-assets: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path server/public/assets) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force server/public/assets }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force server/public/assets | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force client/dist/* server/public/"
